description: Helix calibration corpus. Historical catalyst events with realized outcomes used for empirical base rates and significance scoring. Source: verified market timelines, ETF flow records, exploit databases (DeFiLlama), regulatory filings, and contemporaneous market reports, 2023 through May 11 2026.

confidence_tiers.high: Fully resolved, well-documented in public sources. Used as primary calibration anchors.
confidence_tiers.medium: Resolved but with some uncertainty in exact magnitude. Used as supporting evidence.
confidence_tiers.recent: Within the last 10 days; outcome still settling. Will be updated via recalibration loop as the impact window closes.

events.source_event_text: SEC approves 11 spot Bitcoin ETFs (BlackRock IBIT, Fidelity FBTC, ARK, Bitwise, others)
events.notes: First regulated institutional on-ramp; triggered $58B+ cumulative inflows over two years

events.source_event_text: First day of spot BTC ETF trading; record opening volume across IBIT and FBTC
events.notes: Immediate institutional buying pressure on launch day

events.source_event_text: Fourth Bitcoin halving: block reward reduced from 6.25 BTC to 3.125 BTC
events.notes: 50% reduction in new supply; historically strongest multi-month driver

events.source_event_text: Trump wins US presidential election on pro-crypto platform; expected pro-industry policy shift
events.notes: Pro-crypto campaign messaging materialized into policy expectations

events.source_event_text: Crypto-friendly SEC Commissioner nominated; BTC breaks $100k for first time
events.notes: Regulatory tailwind narrative reignited late-2024 rally

events.source_event_text: MicroStrategy announces $1.1B Bitcoin purchase as part of ongoing treasury strategy
events.notes: Benchmark corporate adoption signal; MSTR pure-play BTC proxy

events.source_event_text: Trump tariff announcement triggers risk-off across equities and crypto

events.notes: Inflation surprise; sell-the-news on macro data

events.source_event_text: Post-halving cycle peak + sustained ETF demand drive BTC to new ATH $126,198
events.notes: Scarcity narrative plus institutional buying; cumulative $58B+ inflows

events.source_event_text: FOMC holds rates with higher-for-longer signaling; BTC drops $90k to $83k
events.notes: Fed disappointment; sell-the-news on hawkish hold

events.source_event_text: Macro uncertainty plus leveraged liquidations cause fastest BTC crash in history (-6 sigma move)
events.notes: Deleveraging cascade; not a single news event but a market structure failure

events.source_event_text: SEC/CFTC joint digital commodity taxonomy ruling clarifies BTC classification
events.notes: Removed securities overhang for BTC as asset class

events.source_event_text: Two-week US-Iran ceasefire announced; risk-on rally takes BTC to $72k

events.source_event_text: 8-day streak of ETF inflows totaling $2.43B; 19,000 BTC absorbed (9x miner output)

events.source_event_text: 6 consecutive weeks of net ETF inflows totaling $3.4B; longest streak in 9 months

events.source_event_text: Abracadabra $6.49M exploit via cauldron contract manipulation
events.notes: Smart-contract insolvency bypass drained collateral; direct hit to MIM peg and SPELL utility

events.source_event_text: Abracadabra $13M Arbitrum cauldron exploit (second hack)

events.source_event_text: Abracadabra $1.8M deprecated V4 cauldron exploit (third hack)
events.notes: Third hack in series; cumulative $21M+ stolen destroyed long-term holder confidence
